user.title: Link your ChatGPT account
user.description:
Open this page to sign in to ChatGPT/Codex, then run the local web companion so it can write the JSON file read by Home Assistant: {chatgpt_url}

Command:
`npm run codex:companion -- --out /config/chatgpt_usage_codex.json --watch-seconds 300`

Check the box once the ChatGPT/Codex page is open or the companion is running.

data.chatgpt_account_linked: I opened ChatGPT/Codex or started the companion
data.api_key: OpenAI Admin API key (API mode only)

settings.title: ChatGPT Usage settings
settings.description: Default mode reads the local JSON file generated by the web companion. OpenAI API mode is optional and requires an admin API key.

data.api_key: OpenAI Admin API key (API mode only)

error.chatgpt_link_required: Open ChatGPT/Codex or start the web companion, then confirm to continue.
error.api_key_required: An OpenAI Admin API key is required for OpenAI API usage mode.
error.codex_file_path_required: A local Codex JSON file path is required for file-based Codex usage.
